target: fj-ad forward tape build in crates/fj-ad/src/lib.rs

benchmark.command: rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-api --bench api_overhead -- value_and_grad_runtime/shared/deep_100_nodes --sample-size 20 --measurement-time 3 --warm-up-time 1

candidates.lever: move outputs into the tape before cloning them into the forward environment
candidates.reason: regressed against the fresh baseline midpoint

candidates.lever: use SmallVec for per-equation tape and scratch vectors
candidates.reason: roughly 1.5 percent midpoint improvement, below score threshold and within cross-worker noise

candidates.lever: replace the forward BTreeMap environment with a dense indexed environment plus sparse fallback
candidates.reason: roughly 1.4 percent midpoint improvement, below score threshold and equivalent to the SmallVec noise band
candidates.validation: rch exec -- cargo check -p fj-ad --all-targets passed with the pre-existing fj-ad g_data warning

final_decision.reason: No candidate cleared the required Impact x Confidence / Effort score >= 2.0.
final_decision.behavior_proof: No source code is committed for this pass; ordering, tie-breaking, floating-point behavior, RNG behavior, and strict/hardened semantics are unchanged by construction.
